examples.title: Servlet Parameter Iteration
examples.description: Demonstrates iterating over HTTP request parameters in a Servlet
examples.explanation: Uses Enumeration from getParameterNames() and while loop to iterate. For multi-valued parameters, use getParameterValues() with enhanced for-each.

examples.title: Labeled Break Example - Find First Match
examples.description: Uses labeled break to exit nested loops when target is found
examples.explanation: Without labeled break, only inner loop would exit. Labeled break exits the outer labeled loop, making search efficient once target is found.

examples.title: JSP Dynamic Table Generation
examples.description: Uses nested for loops to generate an HTML table dynamically
examples.code:
<%@ page contentType="text/html;charset=UTF-8" language="java" %> Dynamic Table

Multiplication Table (1-5)

<% for (int row = 1; row <= 5; row++) { %> <% for (int col = 1; col <= 5; col++) { %> <% } %> <% } %>
<%= row * col %>
examples.explanation: Outer loop creates rows (tr), inner loop creates cells (td). Expression <%= row * col %> evaluates and prints the multiplication result. Generates 5×5 table.
